name: axy-one
description: Build tooling for axy.one (icons, fonts, Tailwind). Content/site is Jekyll — see CLAUDE.md.

scripts.vendor: npm run vendor:fonts && npm run vendor:icons
scripts.build: npm run vendor && npm run build:css && bundle exec jekyll build
scripts.dev: npm run vendor && concurrently -k -n css,jekyll -c cyan,green "tailwindcss -i _tailwind/app.css -o assets/css/main.css --watch" "bundle exec jekyll serve"
